name: Koyfin
description_short: Financial research platform with global market data, advanced graphing, screeners, watchlists, portfolios, dashboards, and fundamental and macro analysis.
description_long:
Koyfin is a financial research and analytics platform for individual investors, analysts, and financial advisors. Its official product documentation describes global equities, bonds, yield curves, foreign exchange, ETFs, mutual funds, financial statements, consensus estimates, watchlists, portfolios, screeners, and customizable dashboards.

The platform's graphing and financial-analysis tools combine market, fundamental, valuation, and macroeconomic series. Koyfin's official functionality guide also documents price, technical, valuation, news, filing, transcript, and press-release alerts, alongside web and mobile access.

Koyfin currently offers Free, Plus, Premium, Advisor Core, and Advisor Pro plans. Plan limits and data coverage vary, so time-sensitive pricing and entitlements should be confirmed on Koyfin's official plan-comparison page before purchase.
pros: Global market, fundamental, valuation, and macroeconomic data
Stock screener with extensive filtering criteria
Free plan for evaluating the core research workflow
Portfolio and advisor workflows on eligible plans
cons: No trade execution — research and analysis only
Plan limits vary substantially across research and advisor tiers
The breadth of data and controls can take time to learn
Some portfolio, reporting, and integration features require advisor plans
Data coverage and history depend on the selected plan
meta_description: Koyfin review covering current Free, Plus, Premium and advisor plans, market data, graphing, screeners, dashboards, portfolios, strengths and limitations.
vendor_verified_note: Pricing and core capabilities checked against Koyfin's official plan comparison and product documentation.
